'''Terra Sool''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Terra Sool system/Legends|Terra Sool system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was [[Battle of Terra Sool|liberated]] from the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
The planet had a [[Terra Sool militia|militia]] that opposed the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Its atmosphere blocked sensors and was filled with flying lizards. The planet was covered in [[Farm/Legends|farmland]] and large mountains.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Terra Sool was under Separatist occupation. Jedi Knights Anakin Skywalker and his master Obi-Wan Kenobi destroyed all of the planet's battle platforms and missiles, making the planet free from the Separatist's clutches once again.

{{Planet-stub}}
